name: skill-creator
tagline: Guides drafting, testing, benchmarking, and description-optimizing Claude Code skills through an iterative eval-and-improve loop.
verdict: Solid, safe meta-skill: concrete steps, named output artifacts (evals.json, grading.json, benchmark.json), explicit failure-path handling across Claude Code/Claude.ai/Cowork. No security issues found. Weak on hygiene: no version/changelog signal, no stated negative triggers despite broad scope, and SKILL.md runs ~32KB with platform-specific sections kept.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion text anywhere despite being a broad meta-skill that could compete with other dev/testing skills.
Platform-specific Claude.ai and Cowork sections kept inline in a ~32KB SKILL.md rather than split to references, though most other bulk is externalized.
SKILL.md is 485 lines / ~32.4KB, over the ~25KB soft budget though under the 2x hard ceiling.
